Off Calendar May-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER CIVIL SERVICE EMPLOYEES INSURANCE COMPANY'S Notice Of Hearing For Order Compelling Arbitration And Appointing Arbitration is Granted. No opposition filed. Order provided with courtesy copies was signed. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
